question: How many COVID-19 vaccine doses were incorrectly sent to Amapá instead of Amazonas in February 2021?
ground_truth: 76,000 doses meant for Amazonas were mistakenly sent to Amapá.
event_desc: The Health Minister admits he mistakenly sent 76,000 doses of COVID-19 vaccines destined for Amazonas state (population 4,000,000) to Amapá municipality (population 9,000). The two places are 1,612 km (1,002 mi) apart.
